name: Kertos
tagline: All-in-one compliance solution for GDPR, ISO27001, SOC2, NIS2, TISAX®, ISO27701, AI Act or ISO42001
description: Kertos is an AI-powered compliance automation platform designed to help businesses streamline and simplify compliance management. By replacing manual processes, spreadsheets, and costly consultants, Kertos enables organizations to stay ahead of growing regulatory demands with speed, accuracy, and efficiency. Our solution adapts to your unique risk profile, ensuring compliance becomes an enabler of growth—not a barrier. With Kertos, businesses can reduce costs, mitigate risks, and future-proof their compliance efforts in an ever-evolving landscape.

name: Ailoys
tagline: Boosting Industrial Efficiency: Expert AI Solutions for Enhanced Manufacturing Performance
description: Ailoys' Industrial AI platform blends Digital Twin, AI, and IoT technologies to revolutionize machinery manufacturing efficiency. Leveraging unique sensor technology, Ailoys rapidly builds precise Digital Twins of manufacturing processes, enabling seamless deployment of easy-to-consume instructions for equipment. These instructions are powered by Ailoys' proprietary algorithms, designed to optimize machine performance and maximize Return on Assets (RoA) for customers. With a deployable SaaS solution, Ailoys allows manufacturers to benefit from its Industrial AI platform from Day 1. Instead of just delivering data insights, Ailoys provides real improvements in manufacturing performance. By utilizing real-time data and AI-driven decision-making, Ailoys empowers companies to minimize downtime, increase output, and reduce costs. Designed for small and medium-sized enterprises, Ailoys' platform is scalable, driving efficiency and innovation in manufacturing

name: DResearch Digital Media Systems GmbH
description:
Digitale Lösungen. Für Institutionen. Für Unternehmen. Für die Zukunft.

Wie geht digitale Transformation? Seit 1994 liefern wir praktische Antworten auf diese Frage. Bahnbrechende Projekte in den Bereichen E-Government, Telekommunikation, Energiewende, Sicherheits-, Infrastruktur- und Gebäude-IT zeugen davon. Wir analysieren, beraten, projektieren, steuern und entwickeln auf höchstem Niveau – gern auch für Ihre Institution oder Ihr Unternehmen! Wir finden Wege zum Ziel, gerade wenn es schwierig wird oder nicht weiterzugehen scheint. Wir konzipieren und entwickeln, leiten anspruchsvolle Projekte und beraten unsere Kunden aus Industrie und Verwaltung. Viele unserer Leistungen erbringen wir in Zusammenarbeit mit erstklassigen Kooperationspartnern.

name: Engelhart
description:
Engelhart is a global commodities trading company built for today's markets and the transitions shaping tomorrow.

We trade across the full commodities complex, from energy and renewables to agriculture, metals, freight, and carbon. Our role is to connect markets, manage risk, and uncover value where others see volatility.

What sets us apart is how we bring it together:

• Deep market expertise across physical and financial products
• Quantitative and data-led insight that strengthens decision-making
• A culture that values collaboration, speed, and independent thinking

Founded in 2013 as part of BTG Pactual Group, Engelhart operates with a strong balance sheet and a global footprint, with offices in London, Berlin, Amsterdam, Geneva, Grenoble, Houston, Austin, Stamford, New York, Tokyo, Shanghai and Singapore. 

Our teams combine technical depth with commercial instinct: delivering liquidity, price discovery, and stability to the world’s most dynamic markets.

We don’t just trade what exists today. We help shape what comes next.

Engelhart
Where the future trades

name: Boam AI
tagline: Managed CRM data for enterprise sales teams selling to restaurants.
description:
Boam AI is the managed data layer for enterprise sales teams in food and beverage distribution and restaurant technology. 20-40% of a food and beverage sales team's leads are disqualified before the first conversation - closed accounts, duplicates, wrong business types. That's 1-2 days a week per rep, wasted. We continuously clean, enrich, and maintain CRM data so reps spend their time selling to accounts that are open, qualified, and ready to buy.

Unlike a one-time data project or a bulk data vendor, Boam runs as a managed service. We flag closed accounts, identify new restaurant openings months before your competitors know they exist, deduplicate records, and enrich accounts with decision-maker contact coverage and custom data attributes for your business. No engineering lift required.

Trusted by Toast, SpotOn, and Uber Eats: our partners get back 20-25% of their sales team's time and see measurable uplift in pipeline velocity and conversion rates.

With Boam AI, your CRM reflects your actual market.

Learn more at boam.ai or reach out to explore a pilot.

name: Sunday Natural
tagline: Premium nutrition inspired by nature. Over 1,500 products of the highest quality and purity.
description:
🌿 Ultra-Pure & Naturally Sourced 🌿

Sunday Natural arose from a long-term commitment to and research into holistic health. The founding of our brand was sparked by our lack of satisfaction with the quality of vitamins, food supplements and teas on the market. We decided to make the kind of supplements we wanted to take: simple, high-quality formulas made from ultra-pure, sustainably-sourced ingredients.

We apply perspectives from science, natural medicine and nutritional science to our passion. Sunday Natural is therefore a specialist in the most effective helpers nature provides: superfoods, teas, food supplements and essential oils. We offer outstanding quality and a wide range of products.

Our brand is built on the following principles:

NATURAL 🌿
Nutrients and active ingredients from natural, plant-based sources, in their most bioactive forms. Where possible, organically certified and pesticide-free.

QUALITY ✨
From leading producers and the top cultivation areas worldwide. Laboratory-tested for purity and nutritional content.

PURITY 💯
Organic cultivation and pure active ingredients without chemical additives. Gentle extraction methods. Non-GMO and free from pollutants. Specialised manufacturing with semi-automated, gentle machinery to preserve the quality of nutrients.

INNOVATION 🔬
Uniquely optimised formulas and products developed through partnerships and knowledge-sharing with holistic therapists, leading scientists, and quality manufacturers.

SUSTAINABILITY 🌱
Almost exclusively vegan products, with a few vegetarian exceptions. All ingredients grown sustainably and bought directly from local suppliers. Environmentally-friendly packaging materials, including glass and biodegradable starch.

TRANSPARENCY 🔎
Maximum transparency about all ingredients and processes (no hidden ingredients).

FAIRNESS ⚖️
Premium quality at a fair price due to direct purchasing and in-house production. Long lasting, fair partnerships with suppliers.

name: Prior Labs
description:
Prior Labs is building breakthrough foundation models that understand spreadsheets and databases - the lifeblood of science and business. While foundation models have transformed text and images, tabular data has remained largely untouched. We're tackling this opportunity to revolutionize how we approach scientific discovery, medical research, financial modeling, and business intelligence.

Backed by Balderton Capital, XTX Ventures, SAP Founder Hans Werner-Hector's Hector Foundation, Atlantic Labs, Galion.exe and top AI leaders such as Peter Sarlin, Guy Podjarny, Thomas Wolf, Ed Grefenstette, Robin Rombach, Christopher Lynch and Ash Kulkarni.
